header.source: Composite of published agency ACE flag lists: APHIS Core Correlation Table (Feb 10, 2026), APHIS Lacey Act schedule, NMFS Trade Monitoring HTS list (Jul 2026), DEA drug-code reference (Mar 2026, CBP Pub). Flag semantics per CBP ACE Agency Tariff Code Reference 0875-0419 (Mar 4, 2026). FDA FD1–FD4 not included — no public machine-readable list exists.
